title: sempervivum pumilum
intro: Sempervivum pumilum, also known as hen and chicks or live forever, is a low-growing, succulent plant species that belongs to the Crassulaceae family. The medicinal properties of Sempervivum pumilum have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including wounds, burns, and skin irritations, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing antioxidant properties. Sempervivum pumilum can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, tinctures, and ointments, which are used topically to treat skin issues and internally to boost the immune system.
